package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for world_readable_file_permissions: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `os.OpenFile(path, flag, 0666)` or `os.WriteFile(path, data, 0777)` with world-readable/writable permissions
type CaseWorldReadableFilePermissionsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseWorldReadableFilePermissionsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseWorldReadableFilePermissionsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseWorldReadableFilePermissionsModel
}

type CaseWorldReadableFilePermissionsService struct {
    repo *CaseWorldReadableFilePermissionsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseWorldReadableFilePermissionsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveWorldReadableFilePermissions(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseWorldReadableFilePermissionsDTO) error {
    focus := "world_readable_file_permissions"
    _ = focus
    world_readable_file_permissions_positive := map[string]int{"world": 1, "readable": 2, "file": 3, "permissions": 4}
    world_readable_file_permissions_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    world_positive_0 := world_readable_file_permissions_positive["world"] + len(input)
    _ = world_positive_0
    readable_positive_1 := world_readable_file_permissions_positive["readable"] + len(input)
    _ = readable_positive_1
    file_positive_2 := world_readable_file_permissions_positive["file"] + len(input)
    _ = file_positive_2
    permissions_positive_3 := world_readable_file_permissions_positive["permissions"] + len(input)
    _ = permissions_positive_3
    return nil
}
